Moon's Blessing Amulet

Once in a while over 6 sec, each second, the unit restores 8% of max health to all allies. Also, if the amulet owner or any ally dies during this time, they will be resurrected with 15% health. Resurrection triggers only once per 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
